name: enableEquationOfTime
description: Enables or disables the Equation of Time display on screen.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to show the equation, false to hide

name: getTextColor
description: Returns the current text color as a Vec3f object (prints as [r, g, b] with values 0.0-1.0).
returnDescription: RGB color as Vec3f (e.g., [0, 0.5, 1] for blue)

name: showEOT
description: Property that controls whether the Equation of Time is displayed. Read via core.getStelProperty(), write via core.setStelProperty().
returnDescription: true if the equation is visible

name: textColor
description: Property that gets/sets the text color. Read via core.getStelProperty() returns a Vec3f array. Write via core.setStelProperty() expects a Vec3f.

name: setTextColor
description: Sets the text color for the Equation of Time display.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector created via core.vec3f(r, g, b)

name: setFlagInvertedValue
description: Sets whether the sign of the Equation of Time should be inverted.

parameters.name: invert
parameters.description: true to invert the sign, false to use standard sign

name: setFlagMsFormat
description: Sets whether the Equation of Time should be displayed in minutes:seconds format.

parameters.name: useMsFormat
parameters.description: true to use minutes:seconds format, false to use decimal minutes

name: setFlagEnableAtStartup
description: Sets whether the plugin should be automatically enabled when Stellarium starts.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to enable at startup, false to disable

name: setFlagShowEOTButton
description: Shows or hides the toolbar button.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show button, false to hide

name: setFontSize
description: Sets the font size for the display in pixels.

name: equationOfTimeStateChanged
description: Signal emitted when the enabled state changes.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true if plugin was enabled, false if disabled
